productDisplayName: Carlton London Men White Strapped Sandal
description: Step away from the thongs and laces, and groove in style with these slip-ons from carlton london. Stylish with a velvetty footbed, this pair makes for a great casual and ethnic wear.Upper Forefoot straps with stitch detailing for comfort and style Made of leather Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Suede footbed for soft and cushioned comfort Stitch detailing on footbed seam for durability and style Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontal grooves along the outsole for grip and stability Mildly raised heel unit for style and comfort shoe care Wipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Clean footbed with a suede brush
